data.desc: The one law of the house — declared by the GM, inherited by every agent, amendable only from the top.
sections: § 1 — The guest is never wrong twice
§ 5 — Every escalation in writing within 15 minutes
§ 9 — No department's ledger goes dark overnight
§ 21 — The guest registry is sealed to all agents

data.desc: Meets at 09:00 daily; decides in the room, signs every amendment in ink.
First voice a guest hears; never lets a request die in a handover.
Standing operating procedure for Front Office — declared by its head, inherited by every Front Office agent.
Runs service like a brigade; tastes everything twice.
Standing operating procedure for F&B — declared by its head, inherited by every F&B agent.
Precise, spares no linen, escalates before apologising.
Standing operating procedure for Housekeeping — declared by its head, inherited by every Housekeeping agent.
Keeps the invisible running; distrusts any gauge it hasn't tapped.
data.note: Lift E2 out of service · rooms 405/409 OOS (water damage)

data.desc: Standing operating procedure for Engineering — declared by its head, inherited by every Engineering agent.
Serene front, chlorine-checked back; the calm is engineered.
Standing operating procedure for Spa & Leisure — declared by its head, inherited by every Spa & Leisure agent.
Choreographs 400 covers without raising a voice.
Standing operating procedure for Events & Banqueting — declared by its head, inherited by every Events & Banqueting agent.
Sees every door; forgets no face; logs before judging.
Standing operating procedure for Security — declared by its head, inherited by every Security agent.
Counts what the house spends before the house feels it.
Standing operating procedure for Finance & Procurement — declared by its head, inherited by every Finance & Procurement agent.
Knows every rota clash before it happens; guards the roster's humans.
Standing operating procedure for People & Culture — declared by its head, inherited by every People & Culture agent.
